text.title: Design Doc Advanced Patterns Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Design Doc Advanced Patterns end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, and output.

step.name: check-triggers
step.action: Determine which triggers fire (cross-system, hot-path, security, migration).

step.name: sequence-diagram
step.action: Draft Mermaid/PlantUML sequence with named actors.

step.name: capacity-model
step.action: Add capacity table with sources per claim.

step.name: failure-modes
step.action: Build failure-mode table with MTTR column.

step.name: migration-playbook
step.action: Write step-by-step migration with rollback decisions.

step.name: link-and-publish
step.action: Insert links from base doc to each advanced block; publish artefact JSON.
